title: 2pk Precision Non-Magnetic Tweezer Stainless Steel Hobby Repair Gold - 5 inch
description:
Non-magnetic tweezers are perfect for gold panning, electronics repair, watch repair, craft projects and science experiments. Since these are made of stainless steel, rust and corrosion won't be a problem. 5" tweezers will easily reach into inconvenient, cramped spaces. The sharp tip allows for precise work like picking up gold flakes, small screws, and material samples. They're also great for assembling miniatures, models and figurines. These tweezers are an essential general purpose precision tool for your collection.
